creator: j@uriah.heep.sax.de
text:
As Mark Diekhans wrote:

> Manual page sync(8) references update(8), but this manual page doesn't
> exist.

Well, update(8) is no external program but a kernel-internal process
now.  I wonder whether we should write a man page, or just drop the
stale xref...

-- 
cheers, J"org

joerg_wunsch@uriah.heep.sax.de -- http://www.sax.de/~joerg/ -- NIC: JW11-RIPE
Never trust an operating system you don't have sources for. ;-)
